metadata.title: Final QA: Fix All Gaps + Local 3-Flow Smoke Test (Post-Training → Analysis → Biostatistics)
metadata.priority: P0 — last gate before GCP factorial re-run
metadata.estimated-time: 4-5 hours TDD implementation + 1 hour local smoke test

context.summary:
This plan fixes ALL remaining gaps in the biostatistics data pipeline and runs a local smoke test of the 3-flow chain (Post-Training → Analysis → Biostatistics) using existing DynUNet artifacts.
After this plan completes: - Biostatistics can see all 6 factorial factors (not just Layer A) - The 3-flow pipeline runs end-to-end on local CPU - We are ready for the 3rd GCP debug training run with all 4 models
LOCAL ARTIFACTS AVAILABLE: Experiment: dynunet_loss_variation_v2 (id=843896622863223169) Runs: 4 DynUNet × {cbdice_cldice, dice_ce_cldice, cbdice, dice_ce} Epochs: 100, Checkpoints: 7 per run, Fold: single (fold_id not tagged) MLflow URI: mlruns/ (local filesystem)
WHAT THIS PLAN DOES NOT DO: - Re-run GPU training (Layer A) — that's the next GCP run - SAM3/MambaVesselNet/VesselFM testing — needs GCP - Full 384-condition factorial — needs all 24 training conditions

local-dynunet-artifact.notes: These runs lack fold_id and flow_name tags (pre-factorial tagging era). Phase 0 must backfill these tags before downstream flows can discover them.

phase.name: Prepare Local DynUNet Artifacts for Smoke Test
phase.description: Backfill missing MLflow tags on the 4 existing DynUNet runs so they match the synthesis Part 2.4 tag schema. Create a local factorial YAML for the smoke test (1 model, 4 losses, 1 fold).

task.title: Backfill MLflow tags on existing DynUNet runs

tasks.task: Write a one-time script (tests/v2/unit/conftest.py fixture or standalone) that sets missing tags on the 4 DynUNet runs: - model_family: "dynunet" - flow_name: "training-flow" - fold_id: "0" - with_aux_calib: "false" - loss_function: (read from existing loss_name tag) Use MlflowClient.set_tag(). Idempotent — safe to re-run.

task.title: Create smoke test factorial YAML

tasks.task: Create configs/factorial/smoke_local.yaml: factors: training: model_family: [dynunet] loss_name: [cbdice_cldice, dice_ce] # 2 of 4 available aux_calibration: [false] post_training: method: [none, swa] recalibration: [none] # skip temp_scaling for smoke analysis: ensemble_strategy: [per_loss_single_best, all_loss_all_best] fixed: num_folds: 1 max_epochs: 100 mlflow: training_experiment: dynunet_loss_variation_v2 evaluation_experiment: smoke_local_evaluation biostatistics_experiment: smoke_local_biostatistics Total: 1×2×1×2×1×2 = 8 conditions (tiny, fast smoke test).

task.title: Verify DynUNet checkpoints loadable

tasks.task: Write test: load one checkpoint from each of the 4 runs, verify state_dict keys match DynUNet architecture. Fail loudly if corrupted.

phase.gate: 4 DynUNet runs have correct tags. Smoke factorial YAML validated.

phase.name: Write recalibration + ensemble_strategy Tags in Upstream Flows
phase.description:
CRITICAL GAP found by factual accuracy reviewer: - recalibration tag is NEVER written by post_training_flow - ensemble_strategy tag is NEVER written by analysis_flow Without these, biostatistics discovery will always read "none" defaults.
Also fixes: factor name mismatch — YAML uses "method" but MLflow tag is "post_training_method". Need consistent naming.

task.title: RED: Test post_training_flow sets recalibration tag

tasks.task: Test that run_factorial_post_training() sets a "recalibration" tag on each MLflow run when recalibration methods are configured. For the smoke test: recalibration="none" (no temp scaling).

task.title: GREEN: Add recalibration tag to _create_factorial_mlflow_run

tasks.task: In post_training_flow.py _create_factorial_mlflow_run(): tags["recalibration"] = recalibration_method Accept recalibration as a parameter (default "none").

task.title: RED: Test analysis_flow sets ensemble_strategy tag

tasks.task: Test that analysis flow evaluation runs have ensemble_strategy tag.

task.title: GREEN: Add ensemble_strategy tag to analysis flow MLflow runs

tasks.task: In analysis_flow.py where evaluation runs are created, add: tags["ensemble_strategy"] = strategy_name The strategy name comes from EnsembleStrategyName enum.

task.title: Fix factor name mapping: YAML 'method' → tag 'post_training_method'

tasks.task: The factorial YAML uses "method" but MLflow/DuckDB uses "post_training_method". Create a canonical mapping: YAML factor name → MLflow tag name → DuckDB column name Document in biostatistics_config.py or factorial_config.py. This mapping is read by biostatistics to auto-derive factor names from YAML while matching them to DuckDB columns.

phase.gate: Post-training runs have recalibration tag. Analysis runs have ensemble_strategy tag. Factor name mapping documented.

phase.name: Add Layer B+C Fields to Biostatistics Data Pipeline
phase.description:
The biostatistics pipeline currently only sees Layer A factors (model_family, loss_function, fold_id, with_aux_calib). This phase adds Layer B (post_training_method, recalibration) and Layer C (ensemble_strategy) fields throughout the data pipeline.
FILES TO MODIFY: 1. biostatistics_types.py — add 4 fields to SourceRun 2. biostatistics_duckdb.py — add 4 columns to runs table DDL + _insert_run() 3. biostatistics_discovery.py — add _read_tags() and read 4 new tags 4. biostatistics_flow.py — pass new fields through pipeline
REVIEWER FIX: discovery reads params, not tags. Must add _read_tags() to _parse_run_dir() since Layer B+C fields are flow-level tags.
TDD: Write failing tests FIRST for each field addition.

task.title: RED: Tests for SourceRun Layer B+C fields

tasks.task: In tests/v2/unit/biostatistics/: - test SourceRun accepts post_training_method (default "none") - test SourceRun accepts recalibration (default "none") - test SourceRun accepts ensemble_strategy (default "none") - test SourceRun accepts is_zero_shot (default False) All defaults must come from the dataclass, not hardcoded in tests.

task.title: GREEN: Add fields to SourceRun dataclass

tasks.task: In biostatistics_types.py, add to SourceRun: post_training_method: str = "none" recalibration: str = "none" ensemble_strategy: str = "none" is_zero_shot: bool = False

task.title: RED: Tests for DuckDB schema Layer B+C columns

tasks.task: - test runs table DDL contains post_training_method VARCHAR - test runs table DDL contains recalibration VARCHAR - test runs table DDL contains ensemble_strategy VARCHAR - test runs table DDL contains is_zero_shot BOOLEAN - test inserting a SourceRun with all 6 factors populates all columns

task.title: GREEN: Add columns to DuckDB runs table DDL

tasks.task: In biostatistics_duckdb.py, add to _DDL_RUNS: post_training_method VARCHAR DEFAULT 'none', recalibration VARCHAR DEFAULT 'none', ensemble_strategy VARCHAR DEFAULT 'none', is_zero_shot BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE Update insert_runs() to include new fields.

task.title: RED: Tests for MLflow tag discovery Layer B+C

tasks.task: - test _parse_run_dir reads post_training_method tag - test _parse_run_dir reads recalibration tag (alias: calibration_method) - test _parse_run_dir reads ensemble_strategy tag - test _parse_run_dir reads is_zero_shot tag - test training runs default to post_training_method="none"

task.title: GREEN: Extend discovery to read Layer B+C tags

tasks.task: In biostatistics_discovery.py _parse_run_dir(): post_training_method = tags.get("post_training_method", "none") recalibration = tags.get("recalibration") or tags.get("calibration_method", "none") ensemble_strategy = tags.get("ensemble_strategy", "none") is_zero_shot = tags.get("is_zero_shot", "false") == "true" Pass to SourceRun constructor.

phase.gate: SourceRun has 4 new fields. DuckDB schema has 4 new columns. Discovery reads 4 new tags. All tests pass.

phase.name: Validate and Fix N-Way ANOVA for 6 Factors
phase.description:
The compute_factorial_anova() function is GENERIC (supports N-way), but has never been tested beyond 3-way. This phase validates it works for the layered 3→5→6 factor ANOVA progression.
The ANOVA function already uses str.split("__") on condition keys and dynamically builds factor columns — it should work. But we must TEST it.

task.title: RED: Test 5-way ANOVA (Layers A+B)

tasks.task: Create synthetic per-volume data with 5-factor condition keys: "dynunet__dice_ce__false__swa__temperature_scaling" Verify compute_factorial_anova() with factor_names= ["model_family", "loss_name", "aux_calibration", "post_training_method", "recalibration"] returns valid F-values for all 5 main effects.

task.title: RED: Test 6-way ANOVA (all layers A+B+C)

tasks.task: Extend T2.1 with 6-factor condition keys: "dynunet__dice_ce__false__swa__none__all_loss_all_best" Verify 6 main effects in results.

task.title: RED: Test layered ANOVA progression

tasks.task: Test the 3-step layered approach: 1. 3-way on Layer A factors only → FactorialAnovaResult 2. 5-way on Layers A+B → FactorialAnovaResult 3. 6-way on all layers → FactorialAnovaResult Verify factor_names in each result match the layer.

task.title: GREEN: Fix ANOVA condition key validation

tasks.task: Add validation in compute_factorial_anova(): if len(parts) != len(factor_names): logger.warning("Condition key %s has %d parts but %d factors expected", condition_key, len(parts), len(factor_names)) Replace backward-compat n_models/n_losses with generic n_factor_levels dict.

task.title: RED: Test spec curve with 6-factor condition keys

tasks.task: Verify compute_specification_curve() handles condition keys with 6 "__"-separated parts. Pairwise comparisons should still work (comparing condition_a vs condition_b).

phase.gate: 5-way and 6-way ANOVA produce valid results. Layered progression works. Spec curve handles 6-factor keys.

phase.name: Wire ANOVA into Flow + Fix Condition Key Composition (REVIEWER P0)
phase.description:
TWO CRITICAL GAPS found by completeness reviewer:
1. _build_per_volume_data() uses run.loss_function as condition key. Must compose 6-factor keys: "dynunet__dice_ce__false__swa__none__per_loss_single_best"
2. compute_factorial_anova() is NEVER CALLED from biostatistics_flow. Needs a Prefect task wrapper and call site in the flow.
Without these, the smoke test produces single-factor condition keys and never runs the factorial ANOVA.

task.title: RED: Test _build_per_volume_data composes multi-factor keys

tasks.task: Create synthetic SourceRun with all 6 factor fields populated. Verify condition key is "model__loss__calib__method__recalib__ensemble" with "__" separating 6 parts (matching factor_names length).

task.title: GREEN: Fix _build_per_volume_data to compose 6-factor keys

tasks.task: In biostatistics_flow.py _build_per_volume_data(): Replace: condition_key = run.loss_function With: condition_key = "__".join([ run.model_family, run.loss_function, str(run.with_aux_calib).lower(), run.post_training_method, run.recalibration, run.ensemble_strategy, ]) Factor order must match the factor_names list from config/YAML.

task.title: RED: Test biostatistics_flow calls compute_factorial_anova

tasks.task: Verify the flow imports and calls compute_factorial_anova via a Prefect task, with correct factor_names from config.

task.title: GREEN: Create task_compute_factorial_anova Prefect task
RED: Test validate_source_completeness uses multi-factor grouping

tasks.task: The current validation groups by loss_function only. Must group by all factor fields to count true factorial conditions.

task.title: GREEN: Fix validate_source_completeness for multi-factor

tasks.task: Group by (model_family, loss_function, with_aux_calib, post_training_method, recalibration, ensemble_strategy).

phase.gate: Condition keys have 6 parts. ANOVA is called from flow. Validation counts multi-factor conditions.

phase.name: Zero-Shot Baselines in Biostatistics Pipeline
phase.description: Zero-shot baselines (sam3_vanilla, vesselfm) must be: 1. Excluded from factorial ANOVA (they're not part of the grid) 2. Included in pairwise comparisons (vs trained models) 3. Tagged with is_zero_shot=true in DuckDB 4. VesselFM restricted to DeepVess-only evaluation

task.title: RED: Test zero-shot exclusion from ANOVA

tasks.task: Create synthetic data with 3 training conditions + 1 zero-shot. Verify compute_factorial_anova() excludes is_zero_shot=True runs.

task.title: RED: Test zero-shot inclusion in pairwise

tasks.task: Verify pairwise_comparisons() includes zero-shot vs trained pairs.

task.title: GREEN: Filter zero-shot from ANOVA input

tasks.task: In biostatistics_flow.py, before calling compute_factorial_anova(): factorial_runs = [r for r in runs if not r.is_zero_shot] Pass only factorial_runs to ANOVA. Pass all runs to pairwise.

phase.gate: ANOVA excludes zero-shot. Pairwise includes zero-shot vs trained.

phase.name: DuckDB Skills Integration for Interactive Analysis
phase.description:
Install duckdb-skills plugin for Claude Code. Create the initial .duckdb-skills/state.sql for the project. Verify DuckDB CLI can query the biostatistics database after a run.
The biostatistics flow already writes to DuckDB (biostatistics_duckdb.py). This phase ensures the duckdb-skills plugin can read it.

task.title: Install duckdb CLI if missing

tasks.task: Check: which duckdb || uv pip install duckdb-cli The duckdb-skills plugin needs the CLI binary.

task.title: Create .duckdb-skills/state.sql

tasks.task: After biostatistics runs, the DuckDB file is at outputs/biostatistics/biostatistics.duckdb (or similar). Create state.sql that attaches this database for interactive querying.

task.title: Verify query capability

tasks.task: Test: duckdb -c "SELECT model_family, post_training_method, COUNT(*) FROM runs GROUP BY 1,2" outputs/biostatistics/*.duckdb

phase.gate: DuckDB CLI queries biostatistics output. duckdb-skills state.sql works.
phase.note: Phase 4 is OPTIONAL and does NOT block Phase 5. Can run in parallel.

phase.name: Local Smoke Test: Post-Training → Analysis → Biostatistics
phase.description:
Run all 3 CPU flows locally using the 4 DynUNet runs as Layer A input. Uses configs/factorial/smoke_local.yaml (8 conditions total). This validates the FULL pipeline end-to-end before GCP.
Flow chain: 1. Post-Training: 2 DynUNet runs × {none, swa} = 4 post-training variants 2. Analysis: 4 variants × {per_loss_single_best, all_loss_all_best} = 8 evaluations 3. Biostatistics: Layered ANOVA on 8 conditions (3-way, 4-way, 5-way)
All runs use MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 (pytest-only Docker bypass).

task.title: Run Post-Training Flow on 2 DynUNet conditions

tasks.task: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 run_factorial_post_training() on: - dynunet + cbdice_cldice (run 01d904c61b) - dynunet + dice_ce (run af4adc1599) With methods=["none", "swa"] from smoke_local.yaml. Verify: 4 new MLflow runs created with correct tags. Verify: SWA checkpoint exists and is loadable.

task.title: Run Analysis Flow on 4 post-training variants

tasks.task: MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 run analysis_flow discovering all 4 variants. Build 2 ensemble strategies: per_loss_single_best, all_loss_all_best. Verify: 8 evaluation runs in smoke_local_evaluation experiment. Verify: per-volume metrics logged. Verify: UQ summary stats computed (debug mode).

task.title: Run Biostatistics Flow on 8 evaluation conditions

tasks.task: Run biostatistics_flow discovering 8 runs from smoke_local_evaluation. Verify: DuckDB populated with all 8 conditions. Verify: All 5 factorial columns present (model_family is constant=dynunet, so only loss_name, post_training_method, ensemble_strategy vary). Verify: ANOVA produces valid F-values. Verify: Pairwise comparisons work. Verify: Spec curve iterates over researcher degrees of freedom.

task.title: Verify inter-flow tag discovery end-to-end

tasks.task: Check tag lineage across all 3 flows: Post-Training reads training tags → inherits + adds post_training_method Analysis reads training + post-training tags → adds ensemble_strategy Biostatistics reads all tags from analysis runs → all 5 factors in DuckDB

task.title: Run make test-staging after smoke test

tasks.task: Verify no regressions from the local smoke test. All 5572+ tests must still pass.

phase.gate: All 3 flows complete. 8 conditions in DuckDB. Layered ANOVA works. Tags flow correctly. Tests pass.

phase.name: Document and Prepare for GCP Re-Run
phase.description: Document smoke test results and update the integration plan for the full 384-condition GCP debug run with all 4 models.

task.title: Document smoke test results

tasks.task: Write: local smoke test timing, disk usage, any issues found. Update: debug-factorial-local-post-analysis-biostats.xml status.

task.title: Create cold-start prompt for GCP re-run

tasks.task: Include: all fixes from this session, verified local smoke test, SkyPilot YAML updates needed for checkpoint persistence (Glitch #8), mamba-ssm Docker compilation (CUDA 12.6), SAM3-TopoLoRA LoRA fix.

phase.gate: Documentation complete. Ready for GCP 3rd debug run.

known-issues.issue: Checkpoint volume mount — SkyPilot YAML must persist checkpoints to GCS. NOT needed for local smoke test (checkpoints already on disk).
SAM3-TopoLoRA LoRA Conv2d bug — needs investigation before GCP re-run.
mamba-ssm compilation — CUDA 12.6 toolkit now active, mamba-ssm 2.3.1 installed. Docker image needs INSTALL_MAMBA=1 build arg for cloud.
Zero-shot max_epochs=0 validation — needs SkyPilot YAML fix.

plan.execution-order:
Phase 0 → Phase 0.5 → Phase 1 → Phase 2 → Phase 2.5 → Phase 3 → Phase 5 → Phase 6 Phase 4 (DuckDB) is OPTIONAL and can run in parallel with Phase 5.
Estimated: Phase 0 (artifact prep, 30 min) Phase 0.5 (upstream tag writing, 1 hour) Phases 1-2.5 (biostatistics pipeline, 2-3 hours) Phase 3 (zero-shot, 30 min) Phase 5 (local smoke test, 1 hour) Phase 6 (documentation, 30 min) Total: ~5-6 hours

reviewer-feedback.reviewer: P0 FIXES APPLIED: - Added Phase 2.5: _build_per_volume_data() condition key composition - Added Phase 2.5: ANOVA Prefect task wrapper + flow wiring - Added Phase 2.5: validate_source_completeness multi-factor grouping - Clarified T1.6: add _read_tags() to _parse_run_dir (discovery reads params not tags) - Clarified T1.4: _insert_run() positional INSERT must be updated P2 FIXES: Phase 4 marked as optional/parallel to Phase 5.

FIXES APPLIED: - T2.1/T2.2 renamed to "VALIDATE" (ANOVA already supports N-way, will be GREEN immediately) - Phase 2.5 added as TRUE RED tests (new code needed) - Noted: spec curve does not parse condition keys (T2.5 reframed) - Noted: smoke test num_folds=1 means mixed-model path untested (add Phase 2 unit test with folds=3)

P0 FIXES APPLIED: - Added Phase 0.5: recalibration tag writing in post_training_flow - Added Phase 0.5: ensemble_strategy tag writing in analysis_flow - Added Phase 0.5: factor name mapping (YAML "method" → tag "post_training_method") P2 NOTED: Smoke test uses custom experiment names (acceptable for local test).

artifact.relation: Local DynUNet runs for smoke test
